summary: BuzzFeed shut down BuzzFeed News and laid off 180 staff (15% of workforce). CEO Jonah Peretti cited AI content generation as a key part of the company's future strategy.
ceo_quote: AI will be used to enhance the quiz experience, inform our brainstorming, and personalize our content.

source.title: BuzzFeed shuts down news division, lays off 180

evidence.description: CEO explicitly positioned AI content generation as company's future.
